name: table-fields
title: Table Fields
description: Standalone, type-safe Airtable-style field types (number, currency, percent, duration, text, url, email, phone, single/multi select, checkbox, rating, button, date) for any shadcn + TanStack Table. Display renderers, Intl formatters, header icons, and clipboard serialization.

files.content:
import {
  AlignLeft,
  Calendar,
  CheckSquare,
  Clock,
  Hash,
  Link as LinkIcon,
  List,
  ListChecks,
  Mail,
  MousePointerClick,
  Percent,
  Phone,
  Star,
  Type,
} from "lucide-react"

/** Header type icon per field name (Airtable-style). */
export const FIELD_ICONS = {
  number: Hash,
  currency: Hash,
  percent: Percent,
  duration: Clock,
  text: Type,
  longText: AlignLeft,
  url: LinkIcon,
  email: Mail,
  phone: Phone,
  singleSelect: List,
  multiSelect: ListChecks,
  checkbox: CheckSquare,
  rating: Star,
  button: MousePointerClick,
  date: Calendar,
} as const
